project: SICOT – Système Intégré de Coopération Internationale et de Traduction
currentSprintFocus: Sprint 11 (Analytics & Rapports, M11) — analytics-dashboard half built this session (8-tab AnalyticsPage.tsx + modules/analytics server, in-memory cache, daily criticité-courriers snapshot job). The `rapports` half (PDF/Excel generation, monthly cron, on-demand reports) is NOT built yet — original Sprint 11 scope only half-delivered. docs/TASKS.md Sprint 11 header not updated, still shows ⬜ À FAIRE.
status: Sprints 1–5 + 8 + 9 + 10 COMPLETE ✅ (7a1de70, 47ef8b8, 6aaa354). Server refactor pass COMPLETE ✅ (dd2809d). Sprint 11 analytics half built this session, pending commit at cache-write time — rapports half still open. Sprints 9/10 still not manually verified end-to-end.

activeSession.task: Sprint 11 — Module Analytics & Rapports (M11), analytics half: new server `modules/analytics` (types/service/controller/route) — one `get*Analytics(filtre)` per module (Accords/Courriers/Missions/Traduction/Demandes/Documents/Glossaire) plus a cross-module `getGlobalAnalytics`, each cached 60s via new `utils/cache.ts` (`avecCache()`, plain in-memory Map, explicitly not multi-instance-safe). Routes gated by `authenticate` + `requireTraducteur` (role hierarchy — traducteur and above). New `courriersCriticiteSnapshots` table + `jobs/criticite-snapshot.ts` (daily 23:55 cron, SQL-side FILTER aggregation, idempotent upsert on `date`) so the courrier-criticité evolution chart has history to read — also registered as a manually-triggerable job in `registre.ts` for backfilling in dev. Client: `AnalyticsPage.tsx` (1700 lines) — 8 tabs (global + M1/M4/M3/M6/M5/M8/M7), `ChartCanvas.tsx` component loading Chart.js from a CDN at runtime (not an npm dep), `analytics.api.ts`, routed at `/analytics`, nav item in Layout.tsx. Drive-by fix: `nav.portail` i18n key had been missing from the English block since Sprint 9 (French had it) — backfilled. NOT built: the `rapports` layer (PDF/Excel generation, ANAC template, monthly cron, on-demand, history) and any CSV/Excel export on the analytics dashboard itself — both were part of the original Sprint 11 plan. See `sessions/2026-07-04.md` for full file-by-file detail.
activeSession.nextAction: Run `tsc --noEmit` on both packages, manually load `/analytics` and click through all 8 tabs with a real date range, manually trigger `courriers_criticite_snapshot` from AdminParametresPage and confirm it writes a row, generate a Drizzle migration for `courriersCriticiteSnapshots` (hand-edited in schema.ts, no migration file — same gap as Sprint 9/10). Then build Sprint 11's other half: `rapports.service.ts` (PDF/Excel, monthly cron, on-demand, history) — this also folds in the old Sprint 5 'rapport mensuel' leftover. Update docs/TASKS.md Sprint 11 status. Still-open from Sprint 9: fix `/portail` → `/portal` href bug in DocumentsPage.tsx (404), migration for portailTokens table. Still open from Sprint 10: manual verification of parameter-driven OTP/lockout/backup-retention/deepl behaviors.

stack.client: React 18 + Vite 5 + Tailwind v4 + framer-motion v12 + react-hook-form + zod + axios + TanStack Query
stack.server: Express 4 + Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL + bcryptjs + jsonwebtoken + nodemailer + node-cron

criticalRules: NEVER run shadcn CLI — Tailwind v4 incompatibility
NEVER put transition inside framer-motion Variants objects
NEVER use CORS origin wildcard with credentials: true
ALWAYS use @/ path alias for client imports
ALWAYS use ANAC design tokens (bg-anac-navy), never raw hex
